meaning: n.门窗的栅栏,[物理]光栅,摩擦,摩擦声adj.刺耳的
examples: She recognized the grating voice of Dr. Sarnoff.
How was he to twist himself through the grating!
Would to heaven I had got my head through the grating!
It's not terribly grating, especially once you start hearing some engine noises, but it is noticeable.
An indulgence to start out with, a final grating of Parmesan puts it over the top.
